message:
test(filedescriptor): add 33 tests for portable fd wrapper (wa-15arp)

Cover Error Display variants, StdioDescriptor, Pipe creation and I/O,
socketpair bidirectional communication and EOF, FileDescriptor dup/
try_clone/set_non_blocking/as_stdio/as_file, OwnedHandle new/dup/
try_clone, poll with timeout/readable/writable/multiple fds, and
raw fd roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
